programme.title: A Father's Choice
programme.desc: An unforgettable story about the promise and the power of family.

programme.title: Three Dates to Forever
programme.desc: When John's new dating app pairs him with radio host Maddie, sparks start to fly.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A designer debuts at a Hamptons wedding and is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Iris: The Movie (G.I. Joe's Byung-Hun Lee)
programme.desc: South Korean National Security Service normally deals with North Korea, but now NSS must deal with IRIS terrorists with a nuke.

programme.title: Citizen of A Kind
programme.desc: After losing her fortune in a scam, Duk-hee sets out to rescue the scammer in China to reclaim her lost money.

programme.title: A Case Of Bachelor Abduction
programme.desc: Three friends investigate a mysterious woman who abducted and shamed two of them, using various tactics.

programme.title: Just Between Us Girls
programme.desc: Amber, Naomi and Morgan have been close friends since high school. Now twenty years into their friendship, a typical girls' night out becomes anything but when loyalties are compromised, dark secrets are revealed, and traumatic truths are told.

programme.title: Boxed In
programme.desc: Ria is an up and coming female boxer whose one and only focus is to be the best boxer alive. That's until she meets Tuga, who shows her that a life without love really isn't a life at all.

programme.title: Art of Love
programme.desc: After a government contracted hit goes wrong, the collateral damage causes Lucas Alba to retire from working for the company. He may be done, but his past eventually catches up with him. The ensuing consequences put the life of him, and anyone close to him in Jeopardy.

programme.title: Mama's Hands
programme.desc: A woman, who was abused as a child by her mentally ill mother, sets out on a journey to find healing through forgiveness. She discovers that she may be too late.

programme.title: Reach Me
programme.desc: A motivational book written by a mysterious man inspires an unlikely group of people. Sylvester Stallone, Lauren Cohan, Cary Elwes and Terry Crews lead a star-studded cast.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: New Orleans ad executive Marley Corbett (Kate Hudson) is a free-spirited woman who embraces her easy sexuality, shuns commitment, and gains support and strength from a close circle of friends. Then Marley learns she has terminal colon cancer. Despite her determination not to be tied down in a serious relationship, Marley finds herself falling in love with her handsome doctor (Gael García Bernal), even as her health slowly deteriorates.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Single mother Teena is brutally assaulted by a local gang in front of her 12-year-old daughter Bethie. Despite Bethie being able to identify the attackers, the defense hires a local hot-shot defense attorney who manipulates the law to their advantage. When the criminals are set free, Gulf War veteran and detective John Dromoor is dismayed by the lack of justice and plots revenge against the men on Teena's behalf.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port Of New Orleans
programme.desc: Terence McDonagh (Nicolas Cage) isn't doing so well. He has a nasty painkiller addiction, courtesy of an injury he sustained while rescuing a prisoner during Hurricane Katrina. Plus, there's his alcoholic father (Tom Bower), boozy wife (Jennifer Coolidge) and prostitute girlfriend (Eva Mendes). And, he's just been saddled with a rookie partner (Shawn Hatosy). Now Terence must pull himself back from the edge of insanity to investigate a series of murders that has the city on edge.

programme.title: Command Performance
programme.desc: When the Russian prime minister is taken hostage at a rock concert in Moscow, it's up to an ex-biker turned rock drummer named Joe (Dolph Lundgren, "Rocky IV") to save him.

programme.title: Samba pros Orixás
programme.desc: The Da Pá Virada Sessions series presents the best musicians of contemporary Brazilian jazz, and beyond. Filmed and curated in São Paulo by director and presenter Dani Gurgel and producer and engineer Thiago Rabello, each session offers a unique experience by giving a fresh look into Brazil's music scene. The artists for each session are selected in consultation with Stingray DJAZZ's music editor. Influenced by the music of the past and present, samba collective Samba pros Orixás bridges the gap between tradition and modernity. Naturally, Samba pros Orixás' repertoire is dominated by sambas, alongside ijexás, jongos, samba de roda, and numerous other infectious Brazilian rhythms that will make you want to move. Don't miss out their tour-de-force performance!

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.sub-title: Robert Sadin/Avishai Cohen, Song for My Brother
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ

programme.title: Hamilton de Holanda & Mario Laginha
programme.sub-title: Hamilton e Laginha - Da Pá Virada Sessions
programme.desc: The series Da Pá Virada sessions presents the best musicians of contemporary Brazilian jazz, and beyond. Filmed in São Paulo, each session offers a unique experience by giving a fresh look into Brazil's music scene. The artists for each session are selected in consultation with Stingray DJAZZ's music editor. One of the bands taking part in this series is the duo of Hamilton and Laginha. Grammy-nominated Hamilton de Holanda, who reintroduced the 10-string mandolin in Brazil, teams up with pianist Mário Laginha for stimulating performances of Brazil's musical treasures.

programme.title: Obsqure & Suz
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Bootsy Collins
programme.sub-title: Casper the Funky Ghost: Bootsy Collins à Vienne
programme.desc: Bootsy Collins, famed for playing with George Clinton and his very own Rubber Band, is used to playing syncopated, hard and relentlessly rhythmic music. With this unique style Bootsy was a major influence on the development of funk. Now in his 60s, the bassist seems animated by a new energy that reflects his new work on the album ‘Tha Funk Capitol of the World'. With this album, Bootsy Collins pays tribute to the artists with whom he worked during his frantic career: from James Brown and Parliament-Funkadelic to Fatboy Slim. During this concert, recorded at the festival Jazz à Vienne, Bootsy maintains that same energy, giving a spectacular show.

programme.title: Fatima Bramme Sey, Andre Atherley, Duane Atherley & Jonathan Geyevu
programme.sub-title: Blue Note Festival: Fatima and the Eglo Live Band
programme.desc: It is a true testament of her capabilities, talent and versatility that few vocalists can claim to have worked with such a diverse array of musicians as Fatima. Her list of collaborators includes Floating Points, Flako, Shafiq Husayn (Sa-Ra), Dam Funk, Scratcha DVA, Dorian Concept, Funkineven, Ras G, VeebeO and Teebs, to name but a few. Currently residing in East London, the velvet-toned Swede stuns with her gorgeous voice, candy-coated melodies and fresh take on modern soul. Fatima joined forces with The Eglo Live Band and has been touring around the world, from the Montreux Jazz Festival to Dimensions. In this broadcast, this unbelievably talented and soulful singer takes the stage with her live band at the unique and ethereal La Gaîté Lyrique in Paris.

programme.title: Neil Young

programme.title: Eric Clapton
programme.desc: Eric Clapton was born in 1945 in the town of Ripley Surrey. His father was a Canadian soldier who had been stationed in the UK but had to return to his wife in Canada as the Second World War closed. With his father missing, Clapton was brought up by his grandparents, who acted as his parents, whilst his young mother pretended to be his sister. He did not find out the truth until he was nine Clapton found solace in his unusual childhood in American 50s rock and roll that had exploded in the UK and although artists like Chuck Berry and Buddy Holly made an impact, it was blues artists like Freddie King, Buddy Guy and B B King, that would be the biggest influence on the developing guitar player. The greatest influence of all though, was the legendary Robert Johnson, who Clapton would call the most important blues singer who ever lived and to whom he would dedicate an entire album much later in his career. Clapton honed his craft playing gigs in both Richmond and the West End of London. After making a name for himself with his talents, he was asked to join the Yardbirds after the previous guitarist had left. The Yardbirds found success with their first studio album, For Your Love, but Clapton himself would leave after just two years. The band would become music legend though, due to the incredible line-up of guitarists that would follow in Clapton's footsteps. Clapton's decision to leave the Yardbirds was out of a determination not to go down a pop-oriented path and to remain committed to the blues He quickly moved on to the aptly-named John Mayall and the Bluesbreakers Clapton's time in the Bluesbreakers would last mere months though. He had befriended drummer Ginger Baker and together with bassist and singer Jack Bruce, they decided to form arguably the world's first super-group, Cream Cream became a global success and Clapton's reputation as the undisputed king of rock guitar seemed safe until a fan, going by the name of Jimi Hendrix asked if he could join Cream on stage for a jam. His performance antics and guitar skills made Clapton leave the stage, asking Jimi's manager, “Is he always this good?” Despite their musical rivalry Clapton and Hendrix became friends. There was mutual admiration between the two right up until Hendrix's untimely death. Clapton said that his death hit him hard Cream began to fall apart at the end of the 1960s and they released their aptly-titled farewell album, Goodbye His biggest hit to date would come with the cover of Bob Marley's I Shot The Sheriff, which his management convinced him to include on 461 Ocean Boulevard. The cover reached number one on the Billboard charts Clapton has continued to release new studio albums and to tour extensively. His long list of former band mates has meant he has had many people to re-join on stage. He has even performed with Jeff Beck, the man who replaced him in the Yardbirds Featuring archive material, music videos “Blue Eyes Blue” “My Father's Eyes”and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists Michael Bonner (Uncut Magazine), Hamish MacBain (Shortlist), John Aizlewood (Evening Standard) Rock Legends Eric Clapton tells the story of one of Britain's enduring rock stars

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: En la final de la temporada, el equipo por fin llega al espacio vacío bajo la cascada, desde donde pueden vislumbrar qué hay más adentro. Sin embargo, la emoción es interrumpida por unos visitantes inesperados que se interponen en su camino.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: El cazador de tesoros estadounidense John Casey regresa a las Filipinas con un nuevo equipo y nuevas tecnologías, con el objetivo de resolver uno de los más grandes misterios de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Tras descubrir el marcador de una bomba, el equipo le llama a un experto en explosivos para que explore una cueva que podría haber sido el cuartel del general Yamashita. Adentro, descubren una posible trampa, así como la primera pista del tesoro.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: A falta de opciones, John planea perforar la montaña para ir bajo la cascada sin embargo, el clima dificulta mucho las cosas. Mientras tanto, Rick halla un artículo en la Grieta 6 que podría probar la presencia de los japoneses.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Mientras que John y Rick trabajan juntos para descifrar un mapa del Lirio Dorado, la Grieta 6 revela su primera pieza del tesoro. Mientras tanto, a Levi y a Geo se les ocurre una solución creativa para atravesar un derrumbe misterioso en el túnel.

programme.title: Lost Gold Of World War II
programme.desc: Conforme el equipo llega al fondo de la Grieta 6, nuevas y sorprendentes pruebas indican que podrían haber llegado demasiado tarde. Mientras tanto, los mineros desencadenan un peligro en el túnel que los pone en riesgo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Ximena decide regresar cuando Alba le cuenta que su padre está en terapia intensiva. Benítez le agradece al general Jiménez el haber detenido a don Cleto y darles un duro golpe a los carteles.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio golpea a su esposa y le dice que no podrá salir de la casa sin su permiso. Leonor queda preocupada al saber que Casillas descubrió su arma. Marco le ofrece a Ximena que ayude a Cleto.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Pollo le cuenta al Topo Galván que don Cleto tuvo un infarto. Cabo se deprime por lo que pasó con Mónica. Víctor toma a Matilde por la fuerza, mientras Aurelio se mete en el cuarto de Leo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Chacorta le pregunta a Heriberto si le gusta Matilde. Ponte y Orejas descubren que el Letrudo es el mismo general Jiménez. Leonor le asegura a Mejía que el Letrudo estuvo en la hacienda.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Turco le dice a Aurelio que tiene los planos del hospital, pero que no tienen muchas opciones para liberar a don Cleto sin sufrir algunas bajas. Mientras, él se entera del plan de su suegro.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio le reclama a don Cleto el quererlo traicionar al aliarse con el Topo Galván, pero don Cleto lo niega. Doris le dice al general Jiménez que elimine a Marco, mientras Mejía salva a Leo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Marco Mejía le enseña a Benítez la grabación donde se demuestra que el general Jiménez Arroyo hace tratos con Casillas. Aurelio llama al Cabo y a Tijeras para que maten al Letrudo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Marco Mejía les dice a Eugenia y a Alfonso que confirmó que Jiménez Arroyo es la persona del Gobierno aliada con el narcotráfico. Aurelio se siente dueño de todo el negocio. Leo visita a Ponte.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora se aferra a Juan como su última salvación, desesperada ataca a Fernando, quien le dispara y ve cómo el cuerpo de ella se pierde en el pantano. Rosario se disculpa con Franco y Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Aníbal, el tío de los Reyes, se encarga de organizar la expedición de rescate, lo acompañan Franco, Óscar y la policía. A Juan se le agudiza el dolor de la pierna y Fernando se va por su lado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Gabriela se cuentan sus historias familiares y él menciona al tío Aníbal, a quien estaban buscando al llegar a la región pero no lo hallaron y por eso pasaron mucho trabajo en el pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La cuadrilla continúa buscando, Juan y Gabriela los escuchan y tienen esperanzas de sobrevivir. Fernando reaparece cuando ellos encuentran una salida y los amenaza, pero cae en el lodo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Gabriela son rescatados. Él no esconde la alegría cuando ve a sus hermanos y finalmente se reencuentra con Norma. Gabriela está muy débil y es hospitalizada. Eva y Aníbal se reconocen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le pide perdón a sus hijas y a su padre, quiere un nuevo comienzo. A su salida del hospital, su familia le prepara una fiesta sorpresa. Franco y Sara se casan y finalmente reina la paz.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Bernardo Elizondo, un hacendado mayor y adinerado, se enamora de Libia, una joven humilde que enfrenta la furia de sus hermanos porque ella es vista como una prostituta por la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | $4M Barn Find Story
programme.sub-title: Rare Ferrari and 427 Cobra Hidden for Decades
programme.desc: Tom Cotter uncovers a barn find motherlode! Behind the doors of a condemned garage lies a rare Ferrari and a 427 Shelby Cobra that have been sitting for decades. This is the story of the find, removal, and auction of these amazing vehicles.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | 5000 motorcycles? Plus, a plethora of Porsches
programme.desc: Tom Cotter introduces us to Steve and his insane collection of motorcycles. After that, Tom stumbles upon and interesting stash of Porsches.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | 700 Cars Hidden on Colorado Ranch
programme.desc: Tom Cotter explores a ranch in Colorado that holds over 700 classic cars from a specific American brand the owner is quite fond of. Next, stick around for a batch of Barn Finds that didn't make it into previous episodes.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | $900 Richard Petty engine, Ford Galaxies and a rare Mach 1 Mustang
programme.desc: Tom Cotter meets "Snowball" Bishop, tours his personal junkyard, and gets some great stories about NASCAR and dirt track racing from the "good ol' days." Next, Tom gets the details on a rare Ford Mustang Mach 1 with a factory 429 Cobra Jet engine.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | American Classics in Detroit and Big-block Camaros in Arizona
programme.desc: Tom Cotter discovers some amazing barn finds in Detroit, MI, including a Buick Caballero, a pair of Pontiac GTOs and a pair of Jaguar XK140s. Next, we find Tom in Arizona where he uncovers some interesting Mopars and two Big-block Chevy Camaros.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Barn find road trip in a restored Ford Country Squire wagon
programme.desc: After attempting to buff out a dusty fender on a junkyard Ford, Tom Cotter is inspired to clean up the whole car, get it running, and take it on a road trip from Texas to Kansas and find more barn finds along the way!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Classic Fords, Chevys and some dusty Italian sports cars!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds himself in Michigan again where he comes upon a pole barn full of Chevys and Fords that owner Denny has all sorts of stories about. Tom then heads to the other end of the state for some European sports car barn finds.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | De Tomaso Pantera locked in trailer for 35 years
programme.desc: Tom Cotter opens up an old trailer to reveal a 1972 De Tomaso Pantera that had been stored there for 35 years. A few years later, we follow up with the gentlemen who bought and fully restored to car.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Dodge Charger and a field full of project cars
programme.desc: Tom Cotter hunts for barn finds in Midland, TX, where he finds a 1972 Dodge Charger for sale. Tom then gets the stories behind a yard full of old project cars.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Dusty Porsche 356 Speedster and an all-original Shelby GT500
programme.desc: In this episode of Barn Find Hunter, Tom Cotter talks with a woman with a dusty 1957 Porsche 356 A Speedster that she and her husband have owned since the 1960s. After that, Tom heads to his hometown and shows a stash of rare barn finds.

programme.title: Save with Jamie

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: For Jacques, a rite of spring is to enjoy the salad his father made every year at this time… Spring is also when asparagus appears and he pairs it with grilled tuna. He cooks fresh peas as soon as they arrive in the market and Jacques, not wanting to waste anything, uses the pods to make a soup. He ends with his friend Ed's Pasta Primavera…

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques doesn't always eat dessert at home, but when he does, it's usually some kind of seasonal fruit. Classics like Baked Apple Bon Femme, Bananas Flambe, Cherry Compote or Pears in Puff Pastry… are served often. A new favorite is a British Lemon Posset. Other simple staples are Blueberries with Lemon and Mint or Grapefruit with Apricot Sauce, all great ways to end a meal.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques prepares a beautiful room temperature buffet in which all of the dishes can be prepared ahead. A menu of Pico de Gallo, Asparagus with Croutons and Chorizo, Melon and Prosciutto, Oven-Baked Salmon with Sun-Dried Tomato and Salsa Mayonnaise, Sweet Cheese Medley, and a gorgeous, layered Almond Cake with Berries is ideal for any celebratory gathering of family and friends.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques takes the traditional long-cooked cassoulet of southwestern France and turns it into a Thirty-Minute Cassoulet that can be made for family or company on a weeknight. It's a meal in itself, but even better with the addition of Avocado Halves in Red Sauce, Smoked Salmon Timbales, or a Zucchini and Tomato Salad. A refreshing dessert of Oranges and Cream Cheese make the perfect meal.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, a large bowl of an earthy soup or stew like Corn and Hominy Chowder or Red Snapper with Mussels and Chorizo can be the perfect meal. In addition, Jacques prepares a quick Cheese Crostini and a Banana Bourbon Coupe, a special ending to any meal.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques, having grown up in France during the war, hates waste! The cooking liquid, juices and bodies of lobsters used in Lobster Salad with Tarragon can be used for Lobster Bisque. Servings of Pressure-Cooker Lamb and White Bean Stew can be extended by serving with Couscous or starting with an Asian Eggplant Salad. Jacques also makes a cost-conscious ricotta and graham cracker dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: After more than fifty years in the kitchen, Jacques still finds new ways to cook a chicken. For Chicken Breasts on Mashed Cauliflower with Red Salsa, the cooking method is classic, but the combination of flavors is fresh. It's a perfect winter dish paired with Smoked Trout Salad with Horseradish Cream and finished off with Pineapple Slices in Kirsch with Sherbet or Mock Tiramisu.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: After a busy day, dinner shouldn't be another challenge. Jacques shares the Shrimp Burger he discovered at Dr. Taco in Playa del Carmen and a great improvisational Bean Purée with Anchovies or Smoked Oysters. With the appetite under control, there is time to work on Wonton Cannelloni in Tomato Sauce, Parsley and Pumpkin Seed Salad, and Caramelized Apple Granola Timbales.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques believes culinary inspiration can come from an infinite number of sources. French classics inspire his Codfish Brandade and Chicken Breasts with Garlic and Parsley. He uses peas to add sweetness to Brococoli Rabe and Pea Fricassee. Brownies take on a new look in a Chocolate Hazelnut Brownie Cake and a hot day and a ripe pineapple inspired Pineapple Frosties.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques was born hungry so many of his first courses are easily adapted to main courses. Baby Mozzarella Salad, Scrambled Eggs with Mushrooms and Truffles, Sautéed Quail with Raita, and Cubed Potatoes with Garlic and Sage are all easily adjusted to fit different appetites. Jacques' good friend, Jean-Claude Szurdak, stops by and offers to prepare Pears in Honeyed Wine as a welcome dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques has gone foraging for mushrooms since childhood, but in Mushroom Velouté with Almonds, Instant Beef Tenderloin Stew, and Mushroom and Raisin Chutney he uses older, store-bought, white button mushrooms with great results. He also creates a starter of Red Beets in Sour Cream and a finish of Apple, Pecan, and Apricot Crumble in no time.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: A pressure cooker is a means of fast, efficient cooking as in Jacques' Veal Roast. To serve with it, Skillet Endives quickly provide a more concentrated taste. Two great starters, Summer Salad Santé and Tomato and Mozzarella Fans, are best with fresh ingredients from the garden, while Pear Brown Betty uses leftover baked goods to provide a dessert that won't have any leftovers.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques gets inspired at the market. Scrambled Eggs on Tomato Jus can be enhanced by the addition of cheeses, vegetables, and herbs. Grilled Striped Bass with Pimento Relish can be varied by using the freshest fish and herbs available. Jacques also introduces the beautifully refreshing Pink Grapefruit Terrine, as well as the Asian inspired Cauliflower with Scallions and Sesame Oil.

programme.title: The Final Finale
programme.desc: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after every day repos. In this episode, Sonia and Froy find a payment procrastinating pervert in the park, Matt and Ronnie put the brakes on a rich racecar driver, Matt and Carlos get stuck in the middle of sign maker's gluing process, and Ronnie and Carlos try to reason with an irresponsible retro racist. And finally, on their most dangerous repo ...

programme.title: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season, the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series. And, get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement when they try to hook up to the car a young couple are trying to hook-up in. Next, tempers and Pizza fly when Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah repo a pizza parlor's customer's car. And finally, Sonia and Lou grab a truck from a car graveyard, but soon have to avoid the employee's scratch attacks and deal with the nervous debtor with a suspicious suitcase full of cash.

programme.title: Exterminate or Retaliate
programme.desc: First, Lou calls in an exterminator and has Froy, Sonia, and Lyndah go to an address to ambush them for their truck. Next, Matt, Froy, and Lou bring the debtors to the ground when they head out to repo a back hoe tractor. And finally, Froy, Lou, and Lyndah bully their way through a bunch of ignorant punk kids to grab some four wheelers.

programme.title: Unwanted Seizures
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor determined to keep the car she won in the divorce. Later, Lou cuts a repo short to send Froy and Matt to tail a car until the debtor realizes he's being followed. And Finally, when a debtor goes into a seizure during his seizure of his vehicle, Lou, Sonia, and Lyndah tend to the man while they wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?
programme.desc: First, Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity. Next, Matt and Froy stand in the way of a drugged debtor keeping his car. And finally, it's time for some ice cream for Lou, Froy, and Sonia when they head out to repo an ice cream truck.

programme.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Froy out to repo from a pizza delivery man way behind on his payments. Then, Matt and Froy deal with an unhelpful citizen when they have to repossess from a cop. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt deal with another repossessor when trying to repo a repo truck, until Lou can get on scene and offer the debtor a deal.

programme.title: Hairy Situations
programme.desc: First, things get hairy when Sonia and Lyndah repo from outside a wig shop. Next, everybody's crying when Lou and Froy's repossession from a young couple ends with a pepper spray to everyone's face. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou repo the targeted car while Matt stands his ground with a family of thugs.

programme.title: Legal Repossession
programme.desc: First, Matt, Froy, and Lou do a legal repossession of an attorney's car. Next, Froy, Lyndah, and Sonia are speechless when they interrupt two girls in the back of a car. And finally, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a bunch of confused ATV owners blindsided by Lou's quick acquisition of their quads.

programme.title: Business Issues
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees. Next, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah deal with a debtor with issues when they take possession of a taco truck. And Finally, Matt, Lou, and Sonia take on a big repo at a dealership and come out with six cars.

programme.title: Nature's Survivors
programme.desc: Every year, the Earth is hit by cyclones, earthquakes, volcanoes and floods. These events make the headlines, with alarming human death toll numbers. But what about animals? This one-hour special explores how animals cope with natural disasters – before, during and after the events themselves. Animals have gone to great lengths to make the most out of some very perilous predicaments, and future climate change could force them to make even more changes in order to survive.

programme.title: Procrastination Station

programme.title: The Future Ahead
programme.desc: Get an awe-inspiring look at the future that awaits with visionaries already predicting, embracing and innovating on the potential of tomorrow. 1) The billion-dollar pollution solution humanity needs right now | Stacy Kauk 2) The future of flying is electrifying | Cory Combs 3) Building the world's largest (and most controversial) power plant | Alex Gendler 4) How to build an equitable and just climate future | Peggy Shepard 5) 5 ethical principles for digitizing humanitarian aid | Aarathi Krishnan 6) How your body could become its own diagnostic lab | Aaron Morris

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) The new political story that could change everything | George Monbiot 2) The psychology of inequality and political division | Keith Payne 3) The psychological traits that shape your political beliefs | Dannagal G. Young 4) Do politics make us irrational? | Jay Van Bavel 5) 3 kinds of bias that shape your worldview | J. Marshall Shepherd

programme.title: Ocean Wonders
programme.desc: Dive into the unexplored world beneath the waves: the beautiful, fragile (and often mysterious) deeps of the ocean. 1) Why fish are better at breathing than you are | Dan Kwartler 2) How I teach kids to love science | Cesar Harada 3) How supply chain transparency can help the planet | Markus Mutz 4) How do fish make electricity? - Eleanor Nelsen 5) Deep sea diving ... in a wheelchair | Sue Austin 6) Mining minerals from seawater | Damian Palin 7) How much of human history is on the bottom of the ocean? - Peter Campbell

programme.title: Universe of Mystery
programme.desc: Unravel some of the most fundamental, yet unexplainable mysteries of the cosmos -- and find a few answers along the way. 1) How humans could evolve to survive in space | Lisa Nip 2) The journey to Pluto, the farthest world ever explored - Alan Stern 3) Let's clean up the space junk orbiting Earth | Natalie Panek 4) Why is NASA sending a spacecraft to a metal world? - Linda T. Elkins-Tanton 5) 3 moons and a planet that could have alien life | James Green 6) What it takes to launch a telescope | Erika Hamden

programme.title: Overlooked History
programme.desc: A collection of histories textbooks and school syllabuses leave out. 1) The most notorious scientific feud in history | Lukas Rieppel 2) When did slavery actually end in the United States? | Karlos Hill and Soraya Field Fiorio 3) The gory history of barber surgeons | Stephanie Honchell Smith 4) The imaginary king who changed the real world 5) The dark history of the overthrow of Hawaii | Sydney Iaukea 6) The merciless mercenaries of the Italian Renaissance | Stephanie Honchell Smith 7) History vs. Henry VIII - Mark Robinson and Alex Gendler 8) Why is the US Constitution so hard to amend? - Peter Paccone 9) What caused the Rwandan Genocide? | Susanne Buckley-Zistel 10) The rise and fall of the Mongol Empire - Anne F. Broadbridge

programme.title: Moalboal White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Known to locals as Basdaku Beach, the name translates to "big sand," and it's no surprise why. Step into this expansive, white sandy beach of crystal clear waters and lose yourself in the never-ending kaleidoscope horizon of changing hues.

programme.title: Diamond Beach II: Indonesia
programme.desc: Often compared to the idyllic beach scenes of postcards, these shores and accompanying diamond-shaped cliffs that lend their name are sure to awe and inspire.

programme.title: Dorothy Falls & Hokitika Gorge: New Zealand
programme.desc: Braving the bridge suspended over the blue-green waters of the Hokitika Gorge is easy with these spectacular views, and appreciate the romance of Dorothy falls in the rain or on a bright sunny day.

programme.title: Peters Pool & Punakaiki: New Zealand
programme.desc: Encounter the tranquil scenes of Peters Pool, with marshy waters, mountain peak reflections, and surrounding rainforests, while also taking in the limestone cliffs, rocky rivers, and impressive coastline of the Punakaiki region.

programme.title: North Island's Waterfalls II: New Zealand
programme.desc: Take a moment to marvel at nature's unyielding force with North Island's many waterfalls. Watch multiple streams glide with quiet ease or cascading waters rushing with high intensity, all surrounded by New Zealand's lush and magical greenery.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 1
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.

programme.title: Lakeside Campfire
programme.desc: Get lost in the mesmerizing beauty of a lakeside campfire.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now II
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E1: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos — Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E3: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt — A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Visual Culture
programme.desc: Visual Culture E1 — An energizing experience filled with bold illustrations and street art.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E1 — A jubilant tribute capturing the essence of merriment and relaxation through a symphony of colors, paired with the musical genres of electro, deep house and lounge. Each piece bursts with bold, expressive designs celebrating the beauty of unwinding.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Colors of Pride E1 ⚊ Artwork collected in celebration of LGBTQ pride.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Black Artists Now E1 — Discover a captivating art collection honoring the richness and diversity of black culture, inviting audiences to embrace diversity and appreciate the extraordinary creativity of artists around the world.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.
